StmtSimple.StatementText:
WITH SeriesParameters (SeriesID, CUSIPType, ValorenType) AS (SELECT sc.ShareClassID, MAX(CASE WHEN pt.Tag = 'JPMCusipType' THEN pv.TreeValue ELSE '' END) AS CusipType, MAX(CASE WHEN pt.Tag = 'JPMValorenType' THEN pv.TreeValue ELSE '' END) AS ValorenType FROM ShareClass sc LEFT OUTER JOIN ( ParameterTreeValue pv INNER JOIN ParameterTree pt ON pv.ParamTreeTypeID = pt.ParamTreeTypeID AND pv.ParamTreeID = pt.ParamTreeID INNER JOIN ParameterTreeType ptt ON pt.ParamTreeTypeID = ptt.ParamTreeTypeID AND ptt.ParameterTreeCategoryID = 11 ) ON sc.ShareClassID = pv.FMObjectID WHERE pt.Tag IN ('JPMCusipType', 'JPMValorenType') GROUP BY sc.ShareClassID),
BankInstructionTypeDefault (ShareholderID, BankInstructionTypeID) AS ( SELECT s.ShareholderID, MAX(bi.BankInstructionTypeID) AS BankInstructionTypeID FROM Shareholder s INNER JOIN BankInfo bi ON s.ShareholderID = bi.FMObjectID WHERE bi.IsDefault = 1 GROUP BY s.ShareholderID )
SELECT tr.[TransID], tr.[NAVID] AS NAVID, tr.[ShareholderID] AS ShareholderID, [TransStatusID], tr.[TransTypeID], [IsTransCleared], [TransNum], tr.[TransDate], [TransRequestDate], [TransReportedDate], tr.CommitmentExpiryDate, tr.InitialSubscriptionDate, tr.[TransAmount], tr.[FXRate], tr.[TransShares], tr.[TransBasis], [RelatedTransID], [RelatedTransID2], tr.[ReferenceNum], tr.[Description], [TransferCounterpartyID], [TransSpecialTypeID], [DrawdownID], [FeeTransID], nv.[FundID] AS FundID, nv.[ShareClassID] AS ShareClassID, nv.[GNAV] as GNAV, nv.[NNAV] as NNAV, nv.[EQAmountPS] as [EQAmountPS], sc.[CurrencyDec] as CurrencyDec, sc.[CurrencyID] as CurrencyID, f.[FMObjectID], f.[FMObjectTypeID], f.[CreatedOn], f.[CreatedBy], f.[LastUpdatedOn], f.[LastUpdatedBy], f.[AuthorizedOn], f.[AuthorizedBy], f.[IsActive], f.[StatusID], f.LastStatusUpdateBy, f.LastStatusUpdateOn, tr.[ClientApproved], [RelatedSUTransID], [DueDiligence], tr.[ParentTransactionID], ptr.[Description] AS ParentTransDesc, ptrt.[ParentTransTypeName] AS ParentTransType, ptrt.[ParentTransTypeID] AS ParentTransTypeID, [OrderID], [LiquidationPenalty], [IsGross], [TransSharesGross], [TransAmountGross], [InitialHWM], [OriginatingShareClassID], tr.[TransPercent], [TransLiquidationGate], (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FMObjectBrokenRule BR WHERE BR.FMObjectID = tr.TransID) AS NumberOfBrokenRules, -- Count docs for all items with the same ParentTransactionID, this also includes current TransID, but only if it has non null ParentTransactionID... (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DocInfoAssoc da WHERE da.FMObjectID IN (SELECT tt.TransID FROM Trans tt WHERE tt.ParentTransactionID = tr.ParentTransactionID)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DocInfoAssoc da WHERE da.FMObjectID = tr.TransID AND tr.ParentTransactionID IS NULL) AS NumberOfRelatedDocuments, sh.ShareholderName, sh.ReferenceNum AS InvestorReference, nv.NAVDate, [BrokenLiquidityRuleAuthorizedBy], [BrokenLiquidityRuleAuthorizedOn], [TransLockupDate], [CapitalCampaignID], [TaxStatusID], tt.IsOnlyCommitmentTrans, tr.IsOriginalRequired, sc.ParentShareClassID, sc.ShareClassTypeID, le.LegalEntityName, le.ReferenceNum AS LegalEntityRef, tr.TransferPrice, ISNULL(tr.[ISThirdPartyFunds], 0) AS ISThirdPartyFunds, ISNULL(tr.IsFullRedemption, 0) AS IsFullRedemption, tr.[EventRef], tr.JPMOmnibusRef, CASE WHEN @CalculateCheckSum = 1 THEN chs.TransactionCheckSum ELSE NULL END AS [CheckSum], (SELECT STRING_AGG(c.CompanyName, ', ') FROM Shareholder s LEFT OUTER JOIN RelatedParty rp ON s.ShareholderID = rp.FMObjectID AND rp.RelatedPartyTypeID I

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN CASE WHEN [Expr1037] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE [Expr1037] END IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1037] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE [Expr1037] END END
[Expr1042]+CASE WHEN CASE WHEN [Expr1045] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE [Expr1045] END IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1045] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE [Expr1045] END END
CASE WHEN [@CalculateCheckSum]=(1) THEN #CheckSums.[TransactionCheckSum] as [chs].[TransactionCheckSum] ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN #tmpTransIDs.[ShareholderOrderTypeID] as [tx].[ShareholderOrderTypeID]=(2) OR #tmpTransIDs.[ShareholderOrderTypeID] as [tx].[ShareholderOrderTypeID]=(4) THEN isnull(#ClassPrimaryHoldbacks.[HoldbackPct] as [cph].[HoldbackPct],#ClassNonPrimaryHoldbacks.[HoldbackPct] as [cnph].[HoldbackPct]) ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN [Expr1026]=N'499 - Hedge Fund (PBA Advisory)' THEN 'Yes' ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1026]=N'497 - Hedge Fund (PBA Non-Advisory)' THEN 'No' ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1027]=N'754 - ABSOLUTE RETURN PRODUCTS - LLP (IPB Advisory/Brokerage)' OR [Expr1027]=N'753 - ARP - TP EQUALIZATION SHARES (IPB Advisory/Brokerage)' OR [Expr1027]=N'750 - ABSOLUTE RETURN PRODUCTS (IPB Advisory/Brokerage)' THEN 'Yes' ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1027]=N'649 - Internal HF Equalization Factor (IPB)' OR [Expr1027]=N'644 - Internal HF Highbridge (IPB)' OR [Expr1027]=N'643 - Internal Global Access (IPB)' OR [Expr1027]=N'642 - Internal HF Sponsored (IPB)' OR [Expr1027]=N'641 - Internal HF JPMF/JF (IPB)' OR [Expr1027]=N'640 - Internal HF JPMAAM (IPB)' THEN 'No' ELSE '' END END END END

Const.ConstValue: N'754 - ABSOLUTE RETURN PRODUCTS - LLP (IPB Advisory/Brokerage)'
N'753 - ARP - TP EQUALIZATION SHARES (IPB Advisory/Brokerage)'

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransID] as [counterPartyLeg].[TransID] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE (1) END,0)
CASE WHEN isnull([JPMMain].[dbo].[ShareholderOrder].[ShareholderOrderID] as [so].[ShareholderOrderID],(0))=(0) THEN (0) ELSE (1) END

MAX(CASE WHEN [JPMMain].[dbo].[ParameterTree].[Tag] as [pt].[Tag]=N'JPMCusipType' THEN [JPMMain].[dbo].[ParameterTreeValue].[TreeValue] as [pv].[TreeValue] ELSE CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nvarchar(max),'',0) END)

MAX(CASE WHEN [JPMMain].[dbo].[ParameterTree].[Tag] as [pt].[Tag]=N'JPMValorenType' THEN [JPMMain].[dbo].[ParameterTreeValue].[TreeValue] as [pv].[TreeValue] ELSE CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nvarchar(max),'',0) END)

[JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=[JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [counterPartyLeg].[TransSpecialTypeID] AND ([JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransID] as [counterPartyLeg].[TransID]=[JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[RelatedTransID] as [t].[RelatedTransID] OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[RelatedTransID] as [counterPartyLeg].[RelatedTransID]=[JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransID] as [t].[TransID]) AND ([JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [t].[TransTypeID]=(1) AND [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [counterPartyLeg].[TransTypeID]=(2) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [t].[TransTypeID]=(2) AND [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [counterPartyLeg].[TransTypeID]=(1))

([JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [t].[TransTypeID]=(1) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransTypeID] as [t].[TransTypeID]=(2)) AND ([JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(2) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(12) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(19) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(20) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(21) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(22) OR [JPMMain].[dbo].[Trans].[TransSpecialTypeID] as [t].[TransSpecialTypeID]=(35))
